description: CompositionWhite T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash careMachine wash cold using a mild detergentDo not soak Dry flat in shade Warm ironCarry the collage of India's top cities on yourself with this white t-shirt from tantra.
